mapper.select:
SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.status = #{status} ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%') ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.is_requested = false AND pr.status = '임시저장' ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.status != '임시저장' ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE status != '임시저장'
SELECT pr.*, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id WHERE pr.id = #{id}

SELECT pr.id AS pr_id, pr.code, pr.title, pr.description, pr.requested_delivery_date, pr.total_amount, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at, u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, prp.id AS prp_id, prp.no, prp.quantity, prp.remarks, prp.product_id, p.code AS product_code, p.name AS product_name, p.purchase_price, p.purchase_unit, pt.name AS product_type_name, pg.name AS product_group_name, pa.name AS product_attribute_name FROM purchase_request pr JOIN user u ON pr.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN purchase_request_product prp ON pr.id = prp.purchase_request_id LEFT JOIN product p ON prp.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_type pt ON p.product_type_id = pt.id LEFT JOIN product_group pg ON p.product_group_id = pg.id LEFT JOIN product_attribute pa ON p.product_attribute_id = pa.id WHERE pr.id = #{id} AND pr.is_requested = false AND pr.status = '임시저장' ORDER BY prp.no ASC

SELECT prp.id, prp.no, prp.quantity, prp.remarks, prp.product_id, p.code AS product_code, p.name AS product_name, p.purchase_price, p.purchase_unit, pt.name AS product_type_name, pg.name AS product_group_name, pa.name AS product_attribute_name FROM purchase_request_product prp JOIN product p ON prp.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN product_type pt ON p.product_type_id = pt.id LEFT JOIN product_group pg ON p.product_group_id = pg.id LEFT JOIN product_attribute pa ON p.product_attribute_id = pa.id WHERE prp.purchase_request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY prp.no ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_request WHERE is_requested = false AND status = '임시저장'
